services.vitaminC_desc: Vitamin C infusions for energy, immune support and wellbeing.

hero.title: Special Therapies
hero.subtitle: Individual Consultation · 45 Minutes
hero.description: In a detailed consultation, we take the time to look at your dental health holistically. Together, we develop an individual treatment plan tailored to your needs and wishes.

a1.title: What can I expect?
a1.content: During your first consultation, we conduct a comprehensive examination and discuss your dental health in detail. We take the time to understand your wishes and concerns, and create a customized treatment plan. State-of-the-art diagnostics and compassionate care are at the heart of everything we do.

a2.title: How do I prepare?
a2.content: Please bring your insurance card and, if available, any recent X-rays or findings. Feel free to note down any questions or concerns you'd like to discuss beforehand. No special preparation is necessary — we take care of everything else.

a3.title: Prices & Insurance
a3.content: The costs for special therapies vary depending on the treatment. Many services are covered by private health insurance. For publicly insured patients, we are happy to provide a transparent cost estimate. Talk to us — we advise honestly and without hidden costs.

grid.title: Special Therapies
grid.subtitle: Specialized treatments for your dental health — from prevention to aesthetics.

ketamin.title: Ketamine
ketamin.desc: Individualized ketamine therapy for treatment-resistant depression, anxiety disorders and chronic pain.

schwermetall.title: Heavy Metal Detox
schwermetall.desc: Targeted elimination of toxic heavy metals to relieve cells, nervous system, and immune function.

schimmel.title: Mold
schimmel.desc: Diagnostics and therapy for chronic mold exposure and the symptoms it causes.

darmreset.title: Gut Reset
darmreset.desc: Restoring and regenerating the gut flora as a foundation for immunity, energy, and mental balance.

hormone.title: Hormones
hormone.desc: Precise hormone diagnostics and individual balance concepts for energy, mood, and performance.

burnout.title: Burnout
burnout.desc: Holistic guidance from exhaustion back into balance — with focus on the nervous system and regeneration.

philosophy.title: Our Holistic Approach
philosophy.p1: At Die Drei Zahnärzte, we don't view dental health in isolation, but as part of your overall well-being. Our special therapies combine cutting-edge dentistry with a holistic understanding of health.
philosophy.p2: Every treatment plan is individually tailored to you. We take the time for thorough diagnostics, explain every step clearly, and personally accompany you through the entire treatment process.

s1.title: Micronutrients
s1.desc: We find out where you're lacking micronutrients and support you with the right supplements, infusions and nutritional advice so your cells can produce steady, sustainable energy.

s2.title: Holistic Diagnostics
s2.desc: Using state-of-the-art diagnostics, we analyze your dental health in the overall context of your body and identify connections that others miss.

s3.title: Regenerative Therapy
s3.desc: With regenerative procedures, we promote your body's natural healing and support the development of healthy dental and tissue structures.

s4.title: Stress Reduction
s4.desc: Chronic stress directly impacts your dental health. We help you identify stress factors and offer treatments that relax body and mind.

s5.title: Prevention & Longevity
s5.desc: Our preventive approach aims to stop problems before they arise — for lifelong healthy teeth and a strong immune system.

s6.title: Holistic Wellness
s6.desc: We combine dentistry with holistic health promotion, creating a treatment experience that brings body and soul into harmony.

s7.title: Immune Support
s7.desc: A strong immune system starts in the mouth. We strengthen your body's natural defenses through targeted therapies and support your natural resilience.

bottomCta.title: Ready for Your Personal Consultation?
bottomCta.description: Book an appointment now and get individual advice on our special therapies.

hero.title: Diagnostics
hero.subtitle: In a single appointment you'll receive in-depth diagnostics, a conversation about your personal health, and an individual plan tailored precisely to your body and your life.

g1.title: Holistic Diagnostics
g1.desc: Digital X-rays, intraoral camera and clinical examination for a complete picture of your dental health.

g2.title: 60 Min. Medical Consultation
g2.desc: Personal conversation with your dentist about findings, symptoms and your individual health goals.

g3.title: Your Individual Treatment Plan
g3.desc: Clear recommendations, prioritized actions and a roadmap for your long-term dental health.

whyUs.title: Why VIVECURA?
whyUs.subtitle: We combine cutting-edge diagnostics with holistic care — no assembly-line medicine, but genuine attention.

w1.title: Causes, not symptoms
w1.desc: We don't treat what shows up on the surface — we treat what's behind it. Our diagnostics go deeper than the usual standard and uncover what conventional exams often miss.

w2.title: Precision, not guesswork
w2.desc: Every recommendation is based on your individual values. No one-size-fits-all, no gut feeling. What we recommend is grounded in measurable evidence.

w3.title: A picture that fits together
w3.desc: We look at your blood, your gut, your hormones, micronutrients, and your lifestyle in context — because health is never a single finding.

focusSection.title: The Most Common Complaints
focusSection.subtitle: Every check is individual. Choose the focus that best matches your symptoms and goals.

s2.title: Metabolic Analysis
s2.desc: Bioimpedance measurement of phase angle, cellular energy assessment & body composition (muscle/fat, hydration).

s3.title: HRV Stress Analysis
s3.desc: Stress, recovery & burnout tendencies. Seeing mental health in biology.

s4.title: Nutrient Analysis
s4.desc: Spectrophotometry (hand scan) for rapid assessment of numerous vitamins, minerals and heavy metals in tissue.

s5.title: Blood Draw on Indication
s5.desc: Selection from one of the largest parameter lists in Germany (partnership with IMD Berlin).

includes.title: Everything you need in one appointment!

i2.title: Consultation
i2.desc: Before we recommend anything, we understand your body, your story and your goals.

i3.title: Health Plan

i4.title: Mentoring
i4.desc: We accompany you long term, adapt your plan, and stay by your side until you truly arrive where you want to be.

benefitsSection.title: Where Diagnostics Meets Real Care

b2.title: Expert Consultation
b2.desc: Detailed discussion of your results and personal health goals.

q1.title: What does the Health Check include?
q1.content: The Health Check includes comprehensive diagnostics (digital X-rays, clinical assessment, specialized tests if needed), a 45-minute consultation with your dentist and an individual health plan with clear recommendations.

q2.title: How do I choose the right focus?
q2.content: Choose the focus that best matches your current symptoms or goals. If you're unsure, we're happy to help you decide — just reach out.

q3.title: How do I prepare?
q3.content: Please bring your insurance card and, if available, any recent findings or X-rays. Feel free to note down questions beforehand. No special preparation is needed.

q4.title: Is the cost covered by insurance?
q4.content: Many services are covered by private health insurance. For publicly insured patients, we provide a transparent cost estimate. Talk to us — we advise honestly and without hidden costs.

q5.title: How are the results discussed?
q5.content: All findings are explained in detail during your personal consultation. You also receive a written summary with your individual health plan.

q6.title: Do I have to start treatment afterwards?
q6.content: No, the Health Check is non-binding. You receive recommendations and can decide at your own pace whether and which treatments make sense for you.

bottomCta.title: Ready for Your Health Check?
bottomCta.desc: Book an appointment now and gain clarity about your dental health.
